_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Detection of precancerous hyperplasia and atypia
Follow-up of previously diagnosed endometrial hyperplasia
Abnormal Papanicolaou smear with atypical cells favoring endometrial origin

ppd_preauth.q: Was the clinical presentation, physical examination ± supporting investigations indicative of procedure?

cpd_claim.q: Was the clinical presentation, physical examination ± supporting investigations indicative of procedure?

common_queries: Clinical presentation, physical examination or supporting investigations not indicative of procedure
Missing clinical notes or supporting investigations at pre-authorization stage
Missing indication for procedure at pre-authorization stage
Missing detailed procedure notes at claim stage
Missing Histopathological Examination report at claim stage
Missing Detailed Discharge Summary at claim stage
